metadata.description: Oversight review queue. Items scraped via `update.py --oversight-only` land here, get classified by audit-oversight + ai-review-oversight, and either auto-promote into actions.json or wait for human review.

items.title: Health Subcommittee Advances Public Health Reauthorizations and Policies to Improve FDA and Medicare to Full Committee
items.flag_reason: HC program mentioned but no fraud signal — needs AI review
items.ai_reason: This appears to be a routine subcommittee advancement of FDA and Medicare policy reauthorizations, not specifically about healthcare fraud, improper payments, or program-integrity oversight.

items.flag_reason: HC program mentioned but no fraud signal — needs AI review
items.ai_reason: This is a markup session on broad public health reauthorizations and FDA/Medicare policies, not specifically focused on healthcare fraud, improper payments, or program integrity oversight.

items.title: Medicaid Managed Care State Directed Payments and Medicaid Fee-For-Service Targeted Medicaid Practitioner Payments Proposed Rule (CMS-2449-P)
items.flag_reason: HC program mentioned but no fraud signal — needs AI review
items.ai_reason: CMS regulatory action on Medicaid payment mechanisms that directly affects program integrity and fraud risk controls, constituting healthcare-fraud-relevant policy governance.

items.title: Connecticut Did Not Always Ensure Selected Nursing Homes Complied With Federal and State Background Check Requirements
items.flag_reason: title lacks HC fraud / program integrity signal
items.ai_reason: This HHS-OIG audit concerns nursing home compliance with background check requirements, which is a quality/safety oversight matter, not a healthcare fraud or program-integrity investigation.
